implementation.publicUrlBase: Configured from FRONTEND_URL or PUBLIC_BASE_URL, defaults to https://fimamacro.com
implementation.usageRule: Use decorative line GIFs mostly on leaderboard/top boards and not on every embed, to avoid visual clutter and mobile lag.

designRules: Top boards must show #rank, display name, profile ID, Discord mention, Roblox username, region, full Stage/Level/Strength, status, wins/losses and active ticket if any.
Vacant slots should still look intentional, with clear instructions for /leaderboard add.
Cards update in place and do not spam the channel.
Line GIFs are optional accents, not required in every message.
